# any2md

> Convert any file format to markdown with YAML frontmatter. Local AI on Apple Silicon via MLX.

## Subcommands

- yt/audio/video: Transcribe audio/video via Parakeet STT with optional Sortformer diarization
- pdf: Extract PDF text via pymupdf4llm, optional VLM OCR for scanned pages
- img: Image OCR via Qwen3.5 vision-language model
- web: Web URL to markdown via ReaderLM-v2
- html: Local HTML to markdown via ReaderLM-v2
- doc: Office documents (DOCX/PPTX/XLSX/EPUB/ODT/RTF) via markitdown
- rst: reStructuredText via pypandoc/docutils
- csv: CSV/TSV to markdown tables (stdlib, zero deps)
- data: JSON/YAML/JSONL to markdown (stdlib, zero deps)
- db: SQLite schema + sample data (stdlib, zero deps)
- sub: Subtitles (SRT/VTT/ASS) via pysubs2
- nb: Jupyter notebooks (stdlib, zero deps)
- eml: Email .eml/.mbox (stdlib, zero deps)
- org: Org-mode (pure regex, zero deps)
- tex: LaTeX (pure regex, zero deps)
- man: Unix man pages (mandoc + regex, zero deps)

## Common Flags

All subcommands: --output-dir/-o, --format/-f (md|txt), --verbose/-v

## Install

brew install roboalchemist/tap/any2md

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/roboalchemist/any2md/blob/main/README.md)
